disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known insulin-dependent (type 1) diabetes, on basal-bolus insulin
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got type 1 diabetes — I've had it for years and I'm on insulin, a long-acting one and a fast one with meals.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not been able to take insulin today because of repeated vomiting, and stopped mealtime doses for fear of going low while unable to eat
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to take your insulin today?
When was your last insulin dose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I've been throwing up so much I haven't kept my insulin down, and I skipped my fast-acting one because I was scared of going low when I can't eat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two days of heavy urination, extreme thirst and rapid weight loss
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in how much you're weeing or drinking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For the last day or two I've been weeing non-stop and so thirsty I can't keep up, and I think I've dropped weight really fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, fast, heavy breathing that the patient cannot slow down
trigger_question_examples: Is your breathing fast or heavy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like I can't get enough air — my roommate says my breathing is really deep and fast and I can't slow it down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling confused, foggy, very weak and dizzy on standing
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling clear-headed, or foggy and confused?
Are you dizzy or lightheaded when you stand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really foggy and weak, and if I try to stand I get severe dizziness — I've been stuck in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated profuse vomiting, unable to tolerate any oral fluids
trigger_question_examples: How much have you been vomiting?
Can you keep any fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been vomiting over and over all morning and I can't keep even water down.

trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what is it like?
Is the pain in one spot or all over?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole belly aches, it's kind of all over rather than one spot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and no localising infective symptoms reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills, cough or burning when weeing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I know of, no cough or burning when I wee — nothing like that.
